title: Living in Boulder vlog 4-11-18 Errands, Organized, Stretched

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder on April 11, 2018: running errands, forgetting a padlock for the pool so he couldn't swim, and spending most of the day stretching to work out physical tightness accumulated from years of sitting. He also describes a large computer project converting and organizing music videos and history audio recordings onto a Sony Walkman for use while swimming.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: deeply committed to daily stretching as essential physical rehabilitation after years of sedentary living
taking a slow, methodical approach — prioritizing stretching before returning to weightlifting and swimming
self-described as not tech-savvy, using workarounds like combining files into one long video rather than playlists

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This is his first video dinner with his video camera because his computer is doing way too many things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When he records himself with his computer, it skips a lot and is loud.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is curious to see how the sound of this video will turn out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't sleep at all the night before last and was busy all day long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took a UNSOMS hidden film, which made him sleep between 12 and 6.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His body was still recovering from all the exercise he's been doing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took two days off for recovery.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had to pick up some things and run errands.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He realized how tight his shoulders were from swimming and weightlifting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He stretched all day because he felt how much he needed it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He tried to go swimming but had to come back because he didn't have a padlock for the lockers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He bought a padlock so he'll be ready next time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't manage to go back to the pool because he started working on his computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was converting and transferring files to free up space on his computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His computer is slow because it's doing multiple tasks at once.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He stretched all afternoon and realized how much his body needed it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to put as many hours into stretching as possible.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He feels physically messed up from sitting around for years.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Stretching is helping him release accumulated tension.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He feels dehydrated from stretching and needs to drink more water.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His goal is to be able to lay on his back with his knees touching the ground and do the splits.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks it might take six months of stretching a few hours a day to achieve his flexibility goals.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to do a history test but his computer is too busy.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He recorded decades and years from his history tests and put them on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to listen to all the recorded history test material in one day and then take the test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is creating one big video file from 700 music videos to play on his TV.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is converting the video file to an MP3 to use on his Sony Walkman.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His Walkman is not sophisticated and can't move between folders, so he's making one long file.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes the file conversion will free up gigabytes of storage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took three days off because his body was in bad shape.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to stretch before getting back into lifting weights.
